## Validation

- [ ] `python -m compileall -q medea main.py utils.py`
- [ ] `ruff check medea main.py setup.py utils.py --select E9,F63,F7,F82`
- [ ] Added or updated tests, or explained why tests are not needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked the relevant issue or explained the motivation
- [ ] Updated docs or examples when behavior changed
- [ ] Avoided committing credentials, large datasets, or generated artifacts
